creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: olgeni
Date: Fri Jul 20 18:35:12 2012
New Revision: 301235
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301235

Log:
  Restore MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE.
  
  PR:		ports/169987
  Submitted by:	amdmi3

Modified:
  head/lang/erlang/Makefile

Modified: head/lang/erlang/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/erlang/Makefile	Fri Jul 20 16:33:32 2012	(r301234)
+++ head/lang/erlang/Makefile	Fri Jul 20 18:35:12 2012	(r301235)
@@ -42,6 +42,8 @@ CONFLICTS?=	erlang-lite-r[0-9]*
 SUB_FILES=	pkg-message
 SUB_LIST=	TOOLS_VSN=${TOOLS_VSN}
 
+MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
+
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	HIPE JAVA KQUEUE ODBC OPENSSL SCTP SMP THREADS WX X11
 OPTIONS_SINGLE=	ODBC
 OPTIONS_SINGLE_ODBC=	IODBC UNIXODBC
